subject: Outlook push notifications not arriving on iPhone
description: User does not hear or see alerts for new Outlook emails; opening the app manually shows unread messages that arrived minutes ago.

ts_steps.title: In-app Outlook notifications
ts_steps.action: Outlook gear → notifications per folder if offered.

ts_steps.title: Focus allow
ts_steps.action: Focus → allow Outlook or disable Focus test.

ts_steps.title: Scheduled Summary
ts_steps.action: Ensure not delaying to summary only.

internal_information: APNs token, Focus, Low Power Mode, Microsoft push path, Background App Refresh off.
